matched_to: luxury travel advisors and tour operators specializing in bespoke Italian experiences

leads.title: President/CEO
leads.headline: President of Tradesco Tours
leads.company_address: 885 W Cross St, Woodland, California 95695, US
leads.company_description: Tradesco Tours is a family-owned tour operator based in the United States that has served North America since 1985. They specialize in ground operations for Europe and Southern Africa, providing FIT packages, escorted tours, luxury safari itineraries, and comprehensive travel arrangements including hotel reservations, transfers, and local guides.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director
leads.company_description: Nelson Travel is a United Kingdom-based tour operator and travel agency incorporated in 2021 that specializes in luxury, tailor-made holidays. The company designs bespoke travel itineraries for clients worldwide, with particular expertise in luxury African safaris, family adventures, honeymoons, and connections to European ski resorts.

leads.title: Vice President & Luxury Travel Advisor
leads.headline: Vice President & Luxury Travel Advisor
leads.company_description: Huffman Travel is a boutique luxury travel agency and consultancy based in the United States, supported by a team of over 20 advisors. They provide bespoke custom itineraries, villa rentals, yacht charters, and private aviation, while securing VIP amenities at global partner hotels for their clients.

leads.title: Vice President
leads.headline: Vice President at Alumni & Associations Services; Asia Pacific Travel
leads.company_address: Asia Pacific Travel Ltd P O Box 350 , Kenilworth, Illinois, USA, 60043
leads.company_description: Asia Pacific Travel, Ltd. is a United States-based upscale tour operator specializing in first-class and deluxe travel to the Asia-Pacific region. The company primarily serves travel agents and upscale, well-traveled retail clients, focusing on individual arrangements and high-end accommodations.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director at Albatross Travel
leads.company_address: str. 9 Mai, nr. 1, Bucuresti, Sector 6 060351, RO
leads.company_description: Albatross Travel Group Limited is a United Kingdom-based group tour operator and wholesaler founded in 1985. The company manages over 2,100 tours annually across the UK and continental Europe, providing wholesale group accommodation and inbound travel services to a diverse international client base.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.company_description: Entire Travel Group is an Australian family-owned wholesale travel company founded in 1971. They curate and deliver unique holiday packages through global partnerships, emphasizing experience-backed itineraries and technology-driven customer service for travelers seeking specialized holiday products.

leads.title: Co-owner: GoSaggio
leads.headline: Luxury Travel Advisory Owner and Operator
leads.company_address: 13 Cider Mill Rd, Lynnfield, Massachusetts 01940, US
leads.company_description: GoSaggio Travel is a luxury travel agency based in Boston, Massachusetts, that specializes in customized itineraries for domestic and international destinations. The agency acts as a booking agent for various suppliers, managing logistics such as flights, accommodations, activities, and ground transfers for their clients.

leads.title: Travel Agent Owner
leads.headline: Travel Agent and owner at Travel with Grace and Style
leads.company_address: 1511 White Smith Rd, Siler City, North Carolina 27344, US
leads.company_description: Travel with Grace and Style is a boutique travel design company based in the United States that creates highly personalized, detail-oriented trips. They leverage destination expertise and specialized local partners to design individual itineraries tailored to the specific tastes, interests, and budgets of their clients.

leads.title: Owner/travel Advisor
leads.headline: Owner/travel Advisor At New Destinations Travel, Llc  | President, Asta Greater New Orleans Chapter | Asta Verified Travel Advisor | Certified Travel Associate | Certified Cruise Counselor

leads.company_description: New Destinations Travel, LLC is a boutique, full-service travel agency based in Louisiana that has operated since 2017. They specialize in crafting custom, seamless journeys for solo travelers and groups, focusing on European and global destinations through detailed planning and high-end partnerships.

leads.title: Co-founder & CFO
leads.headline: Co-founder & CFO
leads.company_description: Kaluah Tours is a United States-based wholesale travel distributor and tour operator that functions as a B2B intermediary for global travel agencies. They provide hotel accommodations, attraction tickets, car rentals, cruises, and customized travel packages through an online booking system with instant confirmation capabilities.
